# Wiki Log

Append-only chronological record of all ingest, query, and lint operations.
Each entry starts with `## [YYYY-MM-DD] <operation> | <title>` so it can be
grep'd: `grep "^## \[" log.md | tail -10` gives the last 10 entries.

Operations: `ingest` | `query` | `lint`

---
